content.name: Station Production Overview
content.author: Chem O`Dun
content.description:
Adds a [b]Production Overview[/b] tab to the info panel tab strip in the map menu (alongside Object Info, Crew, etc.) for player-owned stations. Shows per-ware production and consumption rates, groups wares into Products, Intermediates, and Resources, and previews the impact of planned (not yet built) modules.
[h2][b]Features[/b][/h2] [list] [*] [b]Production Overview Tab[/b]: Dedicated tab in the station info panel showing per-ware produced, consumed, and net total rates per hour. [*] [b]Sector Production Overview[/b]: Same tab in the sector info panel, listing all player-owned production stations in the sector. [*] [b]Ware grouping[/b]: Wares split into [b]Products[/b], [b]Intermediates[/b], and [b]Resources[/b]; workforce-only consumer goods placed in Resources unless also produced on-site. [*] [b]Live vs Estimated mode[/b]: Dropdown switches between actual running rates (with [b]active/total[/b] module count) and theoretical maximum output. [*] [b]Production issue indicators[/b]: Wares with modules waiting on resources or storage are highlighted, with a tooltip showing exact issue counts. [*] [b]Planned module preview[/b]: A delta row per ware shows the production impact of unbuilt modules in the construction plan. [*] [b]Empire balance[/b]: Optional [i]All stations:[/i] sub-row (toggle via [b]Show empire balance[/b] checkbox, single-station view only) shows empire-wide production, consumption, and coloured surplus/deficit for each Product and Intermediate. [*] [b]Quick-navigation buttons[/b]: [i]Configure Station[/i] and [i]Station Overview[/i] at the bottom of the tab. [*] [b]Configurable data refresh[/b]: Slider in options sets the cache duration in UI ticks (1-10, default 3). [*] [b]Error handling options[/b]: Options to show production issues as sub-rows instead of tooltips, and to ignore specific module states when identifying issues. [*] [b]Interoperability option[/b]: Option to synchronize data refresh interval and error handling settings with the [b]Production Stations Tab[/b] mod (if installed). [*] [b]Supports the 9.00 beta[/b]: Compatible with both 8.00 and 9.00 versions of the game. [/list] [h2][b]Requirements[/b][/h2] [list] [*] [b]X4: Foundations[/b]: Version [b]8.00HF4[/b] or higher and [b]UI Extensions and HUD[/b]: Version [b]v8.0.4.3[/b] or higher by [url=https://next.nexusmods.com/profile/kuertee?gameId=2659]kuertee[/url]. [list] [*] Available on Nexus Mods: [url=https://www.nexusmods.com/x4foundations/mods/552]UI Extensions and HUD[/url] [/list] [*] [b]Mod Support APIs[/b]: Version 1.95 or higher by [url=https://next.nexusmods.com/profile/sirnukes?gameId=2659]SirNukes[/url]. [list] [*] Available on Steam: [url=https://steamcommunity.com/sharedfiles/filedetails/?id=2042901274]SirNukes Mod Support APIs[/url] [*] Available on Nexus Mods: [url=https://www.nexusmods.com/x4foundations/mods/503]Mod Support APIs[/url] [/list] [/list] [h2][b]Installation[/b][/h2] [list] [*] [b]Steam Workshop[/b]: [url=https://steamcommunity.com/sharedfiles/filedetails/?id=3695609478]Station Production Overview[/url] - only for [b]Game version 8.00[/b] with latest Steam version of the [b]UI Extensions and HUD[/b] mod (version 80.43 from April 8). [*] [b]Nexus Mods[/b]: [url=https://www.nexusmods.com/x4foundations/mods/2049]Station Production Overview[/url] [/list] [h2][b]Usage[/b][/h2]
Open the map, select a player-owned station, and click the [b]Production Overview[/b] tab in the info panel (left or right side).
[img]https://raw.githubusercontent.com/chemodun/X4-StationProductionOverview/refs/heads/main/docs/images/production_overview_tab.png[/img]
[h2]Live vs Estimated mode[/h2]
The dropdown switches between [b]Current (live state)[/b] (actual running rates; Modules column shows [b]active/total[/b]) and [b]Estimated (all modules active)[/b] (theoretical maximum with workforce bonus).
[img]https://raw.githubusercontent.com/chemodun/X4-StationProductionOverview/refs/heads/main/docs/images/production_calculation_type_dropdown.png[/img] [img]https://raw.githubusercontent.com/chemodun/X4-StationProductionOverview/refs/heads/main/docs/images/production_estimated.png[/img]
[h2]Ware groups[/h2] [list] [*] [b]Products[/b]: produced here, not consumed on-site. [*] [b]Intermediates[/b]: produced and consumed internally. [*] [b]Resources[/b]: consumed as inputs, not produced on-site. [/list] Workforce-only consumer goods (food, medicine, etc.) also appear here unless produced on-site (from version 9.00.08).
[img]https://raw.githubusercontent.com/chemodun/X4-StationProductionOverview/refs/heads/main/docs/images/workforce_resource_usage.png[/img] [img]https://raw.githubusercontent.com/chemodun/X4-StationProductionOverview/refs/heads/main/docs/images/workforce_resource_production.png[/img]
[h2]Planned module preview[/h2]
If the construction plan has unbuilt modules, a delta row per ware shows [b](+N)[/b] planned modules and their additional production/consumption.
[h2]Empire balance[/h2]
Enable the [b]Show empire balance[/b] checkbox (single-station view only) to show an [i]All stations:[/i] sub-row per Product/Intermediate with empire-wide production, consumption, and a coloured balance (green = surplus, red = deficit). Respects Live / Estimated mode.
[img]https://raw.githubusercontent.com/chemodun/X4-StationProductionOverview/refs/heads/main/docs/images/show_empire_balance.png[/img]
[h2]Extensions options[/h2]
[b]Options Menu > Extension options > Station Production Overview[/b]: [list] [*] [b]Data Refresh Interval[/b] (1-10, default 3): UI ticks to reuse cached data before recomputing. Lower = more responsive, higher = less CPU. [*] [b]Show errors as sub-rows[/b]: if checked, the error states of modules are shown as sub-rows under each ware instead of tooltips on the ware name. [*] [b]Ignore errors[/b]: [list] [*] [b]Modules without resources[/b]: if checked, this module state is ignored when identifying production issues, [*] [b]Modules waiting for storage[/b]: if checked, this module state is ignored when identifying production issues. [/list] [*] [b]Synchronize with Production Stations Tab[/b]: if enabled, the data refresh interval and error handling settings are kept in sync between this mod and the [b]Production Stations Tab[/b] mod (if installed). [/list] [img]https://raw.githubusercontent.com/chemodun/X4-StationProductionOverview/refs/heads/main/docs/images/options.png[/img]
[h2]Sector Production Overview[/h2]
Select a sector in the map to get the same [b]Production Overview[/b] tab listing all player-owned production stations in that sector.
[img]https://raw.githubusercontent.com/chemodun/X4-StationProductionOverview/refs/heads/main/docs/images/sector_production_overview_tab.png[/img]
[h2][b]Video[/b][/h2] [list] [*] Station Production Overview and Production Stations Tab interoperability setting and usage [previewyoutube=f0apJSuumY0;full][/previewyoutube] [/list] [h2][b]Credits[/b][/h2] [list] [*] [b]Author[/b]: Chem O`Dun, on [url=https://next.nexusmods.com/profile/ChemODun/mods?gameId=2659]Nexus Mods[/url] and [url=https://steamcommunity.com/id/chemodun/myworkshopfiles/?appid=392160]Steam Workshop[/url] [*] [i]"X4: Foundations"[/i] is a trademark of [url=https://www.egosoft.com]Egosoft[/url]. [/list] [h2][b]Acknowledgements[/b][/h2] [list] [*] [url=https://www.egosoft.com]EGOSOFT[/url] - for the X series. [*] [url=https://next.nexusmods.com/profile/kuertee?gameId=2659]kuertee[/url] - for the [b]UI Extensions and HUD[/b] that makes this extension possible. [*] [url=https://next.nexusmods.com/profile/sirnukes?gameId=2659]SirNukes[/url] — for the [b]Mod Support APIs[/b] that power the UI hooks. [/list]

text.description: Adds a Production Overview tab to the info panel tab strip (alongside Object Info, Crew, etc.) for player-owned stations in the map menu. Shows per-ware production and consumption rates (live or estimated), groups wares into Products, Intermediates, and Resources, and previews the impact of planned modules.

Ajoute un onglet Aperçu de la production au panneau d'informations (à côté de Info objet, Équipage, etc.) pour les stations appartenant au joueur dans le menu de la carte. Affiche les taux de production et de consommation par marchandise (en direct ou estimés), regroupe les marchandises en Produits, Intermédiaires et Ressources, et prévisualise l'impact des modules prévus.

Añade una pestaña de Resumen de Producción al panel de información (junto a Info del objeto, Tripulación, etc.) para estaciones del jugador en el menú del mapa. Muestra tasas de producción y consumo por mercancía (en vivo o estimadas), agrupa mercancías en Productos, Intermedios y Recursos, y previsualiza el impacto de módulos planificados.

Aggiunge una scheda Panoramica produzione al pannello informazioni (accanto a Info oggetto, Equipaggio, ecc.) per le stazioni di proprietà del giocatore nel menu della mappa. Mostra i tassi di produzione e consumo per merce (in tempo reale o stimati), raggruppa le merci in Prodotti, Intermedi e Risorse, e visualizza in anteprima l'impatto dei moduli pianificati.

Přidává záložku Přehled výroby do informačního panelu (vedle Info o objektu, Posádka atd.) pro stanice vlastněné hráčem v mapovém menu. Zobrazuje míry výroby a spotřeby po zboží (živě nebo odhadnuté), seskupuje zboží do Produktů, Meziproduktů a Zdrojů a zobrazuje náhled dopadu plánovaných modulů.

Adds a Production Overview tab to the info panel tab strip (alongside Object Info, Crew, etc.) for player-owned stations in the map menu. Shows per-ware production and consumption rates (live or estimated), groups wares into Products, Intermediates, and Resources, and previews the impact of planned modules.

Dodaje zakładkę Przegląd produkcji do panelu informacyjnego (obok Info o obiekcie, Załoga itp.) dla stacji należących do gracza w menu mapy. Pokazuje wskaźniki produkcji i zużycia według towarów (na żywo lub szacowane), grupuje towary na Produkty, Półprodukty i Zasoby oraz wyświetla podgląd wpływu planowanych modułów.

Fügt einen Produktionsübersichts-Tab zum Info-Panel (neben Objektinfo, Besatzung usw.) für spielereigene Stationen im Kartenmenü hinzu. Zeigt Produktions- und Verbrauchsraten pro Ware (live oder geschätzt), gruppiert Waren in Produkte, Zwischenprodukte und Ressourcen und zeigt eine Vorschau der Auswirkungen geplanter Module.

Adiciona uma aba Visão Geral da Produção ao painel de informações (ao lado de Info do Objeto, Tripulação, etc.) para estações de propriedade do jogador no menu do mapa. Mostra taxas de produção e consumo por mercadoria (ao vivo ou estimadas), agrupa mercadorias em Produtos, Intermediários e Recursos, e pré-visualiza o impacto de módulos planejados.
マップメニューのプレイヤー所有ステーションの情報パネル（オブジェクト情報、乗組員などと並んで）に生産概要タブを追加します。商品ごとの生産率と消費率（ライブまたは推定）を表示し、商品を製品、中間製品、資源にグループ化し、計画されたモジュールの影響をプレビューします。
지도 메뉴의 플레이어 소유 스테이션에 대한 정보 패널(오브젝트 정보, 승무원 등과 함께)에 생산 개요 탭을 추가합니다. 상품별 생산 및 소비율(실시간 또는 추정)을 표시하고, 상품을 제품, 중간재, 자원으로 그룹화하며, 계획된 모듈의 영향을 미리 봅니다.
在地图菜单中为玩家拥有的空间站的信息面板（与物体信息、船员等并列）添加生产概览选项卡。显示按商品的生产和消耗率（实时或估计），将商品分组为产品、中间产品和资源，并预览计划模块的影响。
在地圖選單中為玩家擁有的空間站的資訊面板（與物體資訊、船員等並列）新增生產概覽標籤。顯示按商品的生產和消耗率（即時或估計），將商品分組為產品、中間產品和資源，並預覽計畫模組的影響。

Harita menüsünde oyuncuya ait istasyonlar için bilgi paneline (Nesne Bilgisi, Mürettebat vb. ile birlikte) bir Üretim Özeti sekmesi ekler. Mal başına üretim ve tüketim oranlarını (canlı veya tahmini) gösterir, malları Ürünler, Ara Ürünler ve Kaynaklar olarak gruplandırır ve planlanan modüllerin etkisini önizler.

Додає вкладку Огляд виробництва до інформаційної панелі (поряд з Інфо про об'єкт, Екіпаж тощо) для станцій гравця в меню карти. Показує показники виробництва та споживання за товарами (наживо або оціночно), групує товари на Продукти, Напівпродукти та Ресурси та попередньо переглядає вплив запланованих модулів.
